[=] Access Hitag S in Plain mode

[=] --- Tag Information ---------------------------
[=]  Memory type...... Hitag S 256
[=]  Authenticaion.... No
[=]  TTF coding....... Manchester
[=]  TTF data rate.... 4 kBit
[=]  TTF mode......... TTF Mode disabled (= RTF Mode)
[=]  Config locked.... No
[=]  Key/PWD locked... No

[=] --- Tag Data ---------------------------
[=]   # | 00 01 02 03 | ascii | perm | info
[=] ----+-------------+-------+------+------
[+]   0 | 11 22 33 44 | ."3D  | RO   | UID
[+]   1 | C9 00 00 AA | ....  | RW   | Config
[+]   2 | 44 45 4D 4F | DEMO  | RW   | Data
[+]   3 | 54 45 53 54 | TEST  | RW   | Data
[+]   4 | 00 00 00 00 | ....  | RW   | Data
[+]   5 | 00 00 00 00 | ....  | RW   | Data
[+]   6 | 00 00 00 00 | ....  | RW   | Data
[+]   7 | 52 44 59 21 | RDY!  | RW   | Data
[=] ----+-------------+-------+------+------
[=]  RO = Read Only, RW = Read Write
[=]  OTP = One Time Programmable
[=]  RO/W = Partially Read Write
[=] ----------------------------------------
